channel.title: q-fin.PR updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: q-fin.PR updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Explicit Rational Formulae for Bachelier (Normal) Implied Volatility
item.description: arXiv:2605.18343v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present two explicit rational formulae for Bachelier, or normal, implied volatility. The formulae take the option price, forward, strike, and expiry as inputs and return the implied normal volatility without iteration. They follow the branch structure of LFK-4, but use the simpler near-the-money variable given by the absolute forward-strike difference divided by the tail time value, avoiding a logarithm and a small-argument Taylor branch in that region. LFK-2026 is the accuracy-oriented formula and approximates reciprocal absolute standardized moneyness directly in the far tail. LFK-2026C keeps the same shifted out-of-the-money rational tail approximation, but splits the near-the-money branch two low degree rationals. In double precision tests both remain close to machine accuracy, while LFK-2026C is the faster scalar implementation on the current benchmark mix.
item.dc:creator: Fabien Le Floc'h
